_to_text8
zgConvert a space-separated list of flag text values into a flags
    value.
    Returns an ``int``
    )
	from_text@
zgConvert a flags value into a space-separated list of flag text
    values.
    Returns a ``str``.
    )

zqConvert a space-separated list of EDNS flag text values into a EDNS
    flags value.
    Returns an ``int``
    )
edns_from_textT
zrConvert an EDNS flags value into a space-separated list of EDNS flag
    text values.
    Returns a ``str``.
